title: [v4.4.1-rhel] remote,build: ignore if `.containerignore` or `.dockerignore` is a symlink outside of buildContext
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #16315

/assign lsm5

```release-note
remote,build: do not allow to process arbitrary symlinks on host for remote builds.
```

comments.body:

Quay search broke on 2023-11-15 and is still not fixed. You need to cherry-pick a9d8205b3. I have no clue how to do that in a bot PR; you may need to submit as a manual PR.
@lsm5 PTAL at @edsantiago 's last comment, holler if you want me to run with this.
